task_completion.description: Verify that 'Brown v. Board of Education' is tagged with exactly 'equal protection' and 'education law'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism interface, when 'Brown v. Board of Education' is selected, the tags pane (usually in the right sidebar under the 'Tags' tab) must show exactly the tags 'equal protection' and 'education law', with no other tags present.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Miranda v. Arizona' is tagged with exactly 'criminal procedure' and 'Fifth Amendment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism interface, when 'Miranda v. Arizona' is selected, the tags pane must show exactly the tags 'criminal procedure' and 'Fifth Amendment', with no other tags present.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'New York Times Co. v. Sullivan' is tagged with exactly 'First Amendment' and 'defamation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism interface, when 'New York Times Co. v. Sullivan' is selected, the tags pane must show exactly the tags 'First Amendment' and 'defamation', with no other tags present.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Gideon v. Wainwright' is tagged with exactly 'Sixth Amendment' and 'right to counsel'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism interface, when 'Gideon v. Wainwright' is selected, the tags pane must show exactly the tags 'Sixth Amendment' and 'right to counsel', with no other tags present.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'The Path of the Law' is tagged with exactly 'legal theory' and 'jurisprudence'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism interface, when 'The Path of the Law' is selected, the tags pane must show exactly the tags 'legal theory' and 'jurisprudence', with no other tags present.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jurism graphical user interface to apply the tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jurism application window open and being interacted with, rather than just a text editor or a script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible executing 'sqlite3' commands, Python scripts, or SQL queries to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Tags were genuinely added to the items within the reference manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: Tags should appear in the standard Jurism tag interface (e.g., colored tag icons, tag input fields, or the tag selector at the bottom left/right pane) and not just typed into a note or abstract field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following exact mappings must be verified for the 5 target items: 1) 'Brown v. Board' -> ['equal protection', 'education law']; 2) 'Miranda v. Arizona' -> ['criminal procedure', 'Fifth Amendment']; 3) 'New York Times' -> ['First Amendment', 'defamation']; 4) 'Gideon v. Wainwright' -> ['Sixth Amendment', 'right to counsel']; 5) 'Path of the Law' -> ['legal theory', 'jurisprudence']. Each item must have EXACTLY these two tags and no others. Tag names are case-sensitive and must match exactly.
